title: Matrix Multiplication Algorithm
description: Step-by-step process for multiplying two matrices
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start: Matrix Multiplication Input matrices A (m x n) and B (n x p)] --> B1[Structures: Initialize Result Matrix C (m x p) with zeros] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1[Processing: Initialize row index i = 0] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1{{"Is i < m (number of rows in A)?"}} style D1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff D1 -- Yes --> E1[Processing: Initialize column index j = 0] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> F1{{"Is j < p (number of columns in B)?"}} style F1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff F1 -- Yes --> G1[Processing: Initialize inner index k = 0] style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff G1 --> H1{{"Is k < n (number of columns in A, rows in B)?"}} style H1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff H1 -- Yes --> I1[Processing: C[i][j] = C[i][j] + A[i][k] * B[k][j]] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff I1 --> J1[Processing: k = k + 1] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> H1 H1 -- No --> K1[Processing: j = j + 1] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> F1 F1 -- No --> L1[Processing: i = i + 1] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> D1 D1 -- No --> M1[Product: Result Matrix C (m x p)] style M1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff M1 --> N1[End: Matrix Multiplication Return Result Matrix C] style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: /Start: Matrix Multiplication/ Input matrices A (m x n) and B (n x p)
/Structures:/ Initialize Result Matrix C (m x p) with zeros
{Is i < m (number of rows in A)?}} style D1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff D1 -- Yes --> E1[/Processing:/ Initialize column index j = 0
{Is j < p (number of columns in B)?}} style F1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff F1 -- Yes --> G1[/Processing:/ Initialize inner index k = 0
{Is k < n (number of columns in A, rows in B)?}} style H1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff H1 -- Yes --> I1[/Processing:/ C[i
/End: Matrix Multiplication/ Return Result Matrix C
